top.title: Hundreds arrested and dozens of police injured after Champions League riots in France
top.summary: Nearly 800 people were arrested after clashes with police which saw 219 people injured, including 57 police officers.

top.title: Japan defence minister denies militarism and criticises China's 'huge arsenal'
top.summary: Shinjiro Koizumi makes some of Tokyo's most pointed remarks yet in the dispute over Japan's military build-up.

top.title: Ebola spread in DR Congo 'deeply alarming', MSF warns
top.summary: The medical charity's comments come as the head of the World Health Organization visits the region worst-hit by the virus outbreak.

top.title: 'Controversial' North Korean invasion setting for next Call of Duty game
top.summary: Developer Infinity Ward said the game will be "grounded in the military authenticity" the series is known for.

top.title: Humanoid robots 'the future' of car making, says BMW
top.summary: BMW is introducing humanoid robots to a car plant in Europe, building on similar projects in the US.

top.title: California Attorney General sues 23andMe successor for 2023 data breach
top.summary: Attorney General Rob Bonta alleges the company lied about the breach's severity.

title.#text: 007 First Light is already discounted for the PS5 and Steam
Marathon’s second season is a chance for Bungie to turn things around
A meteor exploded off the coast of Boston
